usage: addInst [-help] -cell <cellName> [-dontSnapToPlacementGrid] -inst <instName> [-loc {x y}] [-moduleBased <moduleName>] [-ori <orientation>] [-physical] [-place_status {fixed soft_fixed placed unplaced cover}]

options.name: -dontSnapToPlacementGrid
options.description: Don't snap location to placement grid for added instance, default is false

options.name: -ori
options.description: orientation, {R0 | R90 |R180 |R270 | MX | MX90 | MY | MY90}

options.name: -place_status
options.description: {fixed soft_fixed placed unplaced cover} Placement status; {fixed|soft_fixed|placed|unplaced|cover}
